▲ Page top
RE: Ok, so WHERE?
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2006 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
It's quested.
Read the Innoruuk's Curse walkthrough.
After getting the cell key, and blood and such, you turn in parts and get the Will of Innouruk and Head of the Valiant, BP and Ear.
The combine container for one of them is given by an npc along the shore near docks in Tox.

what if
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2002 at 2:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253415149
7 posts
...i know some epic portions can be done by different classes. I know you can give quags horn for the bard epic to the half elf female in BB to get another part of the bard epic...i did this once just to see what the hand in yielded and recieved the next piece and i think faction. Now what if the SK did the first few parts of the shammy epic. Even if he was KoS to true spirit what if he FD'd by one of the lesser spirits to make him indiff and did the hand ins just for faction.

QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2002 at 4:56 PM Rating: Decent

1 post

▲ Page top
Will of Innoruuk
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 11:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755836224
12 posts
I have this, and it's a fantastic BP. Probably the best pre-Velious SK BP. I'd even go so far as to say it's still better than most Velious armor, excepting ToV armor. The quest portion that yields this BP also yields an amazing earring: Head of the Valiant, str/dex/int + 10.

Unfortunately, since I got it I know have to think about which BP to wear for a particular encounter: blood ember or will of innoruuk. Hmm, such a horrible situation to be in. =)

Best Regards,
Alaryas Ix`Stynia
57 Revenant of Mithaniel Marr
▲ Page top
RE: Will of Innoruuk
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2003 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762323414
109 posts
Easy...
Wear the Blood Ember BP and get the earring...
Blood ember bp is 40ac just like this with 8 to int/str/sta/dex (i believe)...but the Blood Ember bp procs Greater shielding...which tacks on 30 some odd ac. making be bp 70ac...Then add on the stats from the earring you will get from the will of inny and you have even better stats and ac =)

just my 2cp.
▲ Page top
RE: Will of Innoruuk
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2003 at 3:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759801853

Well if you think about it all around, this BP is better for raid encounters =D notice the SV's....
▲ Page top
Awesome SK BP
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 10:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752849227
26 posts
My guildleader wore this while going for his epic and loved it so much that, after he finished the epic, he went right back and quested until he got another one. SK epic is one of the few that will get you two uber pieces if you work it - the sword and this BP.

This thing rocks hard!

Wilor Baneslayer
Officer of Iron Tower
Vallon Zek
(Very Jealous Warrior)
▲ Page top
RE: Awesome SK BP
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 8:15 AM Rating: Default
Drakang
View User Forum
Scholar
252 posts
SK epic was changed slightly again. When you turn in the coin to receive the epic you become KOS to truespirit which is all the Epic mobs for SK and shaman. So if you want an extra BP you need to do all up to the actuall hand in prior to epic fight and then stash one BP on a corpse while you get the second on to use for the turn in. Can also be done with some Can also be done with some carefully timed invis/hiding but safer to get the second one before handing in the first.
____________________________
The Power of Hate conquers all foes.
Leader of The Silent Minority a Rathe Guild

Yeah, it's a common strategy for doing Charsis, at the end of the crawl, to duel and kill each other, quick rez, and loot everything except the no rent key. There have been cases where someone would do this and loot multiple keys....kind of a charsis key shop.

unless they've changed it, you can have two lore items if ones on a corpse. when i was a nub way back in the day, we'd get a lore tome to turn into a Priest of Discord whenever we died. you had to destroy your one tome before you could loot the one on your corpse, which freaked me out because i had the one on my corpse in a bag... =0

▲ Page top
Dude, think before you speak please
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 8:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780842319
30 posts
Man, what makes you think you can not have BOTH? Just do the quest to turn this in and just get another one? What is so hard about that? Like people doing the shaw and ring quests to get the best ones, then doing them again to get the next lower item.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 04 2001 at 9:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You cant have both, when you turn them in for the epic it bottoms your faction out with the quest giver and there is no way to get it back up again. Try learning a little, then come back and berate people.
RE: Dude, think before you speak please
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 1:23 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591751610726
6 posts
Actually try learning a little yourself.

1) If you get your faction up to kindly, and finish the epic, you will still be dubious and thus able to do this portion of the quest again.

2) Finish the quest like normal, and then run Marl notes back and forth to raise your faction and be able to do it again.

3) Get the Will of Innoruk and Head of Valiant, then kill the mummy again for the items. Finish the epic, and have someone help you invis turn in the quest items to get the BP and earring again.

4) Do the sk epic as normal, then do the shaman epic up to the black dire part, your faction will then be enough to get the Will of Innoruk and Head of Valiant.

So, as the post says: Dude, think before you speak please.
▲ Page top
RE: Dude, think before you speak please
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 11:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751003709
View User Forum
120 posts
QUOTE:
"1) If you get your faction up to kindly, and finish the epic, you will still be dubious and thus able to do this portion of the quest again."

Or you can get your faction to Max ally and come out high apprehensive or indifferent, heh. But yes, there are ways around alot of that stuff :) Also, dont some classes of SK get hide an sneak, so its not impossible to get faction.

▲ Page top
RE: Dude, think before you speak please
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 10:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763322905
32 posts
why does SK need help with invis?
▲ Page top
RE: Dude, think before you speak please
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 4:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757464810
156 posts
If you start a trade with an NPC, any invisibility spells you have on go away and the NPC sees you with your normal faction. You can't cast any spells while in a trade. If someone casts invis on you AFTER you initiate the trade but BEFORE you hit the trade button, you go invisible and as you should know, when an NPC can't see you, your faction is Indifferent.

The point is, you can't do this by yourself, you need another character to cast invis after you open the trade window so your faction is good enough to get the reward.
▲ Page top
RE: Dude, think before you speak please
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2001 at 8:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755441721
12 posts
As an SK, I've had HIDE skill since level 35. I You can hide on top of your invis from Gather Shadows and click on a vendor with faction problems without a 3rd party casting invis. This is how I got my faction straightned out at the Outpost doing the Braid Quest.

I am about to start the epic. From an RP standpoint, of neglected by Verant, this extra reward represents a nice twist for Shadownights.
